home_subtitulo: Paddle Surf in Torremolinos. Lessons, rentals, camps and groups.
reservas_texto: Choose your activity, select a date and pay 50% to secure your spot.
cursos_meta_titulo: Paddle Surf Courses | DR Paddle Surf Torremolinos
cursos_meta_desc: Paddle Surf courses in Torremolinos. Baptism, level 2 and level 3. Learn SUP with professional instructors. Book online.
cursos_intro_texto: Our SUP courses are aimed at all ages and levels: from basic initiation to technical improvement and surf practice. Learn in a safe, fun environment surrounded by nature.
cursos_bautismo_texto:
We will teach you everything to start practicing SUP. From day one you will stand on the board, learn to control your balance and master basic paddling techniques.

This module takes place in flat water, always looking for the best sea and wind conditions.
cursos_n2_texto:
In this level you will learn different types of turns, paddle improvement and how to move safely on the board.

Ideal for those who have already tried SUP and want to progress.
cursos_n3_texto:
Here we take the step towards surf: knowledge of waves, wind and tides, paddle timing and take-off techniques in waves.

This will be your initiation level to SUP Surf.
alquiler_meta_titulo: Paddle Surf Rentals | DR Paddle Surf Torremolinos
alquiler_meta_desc: Paddle Surf rentals in Torremolinos. Premium boards by the hour, King Paddle and sea experiences. Book online and enjoy SUP.
alquiler_intro_titulo: Enjoy the sea at your own pace
alquiler_intro_texto: If you like enjoying a beach day while trying new sensations, this is your chance. Rent our equipment and feel free on the water.
alquiler_1h_desc: Perfect for a first contact or a quick ride.
alquiler_2h_desc: Ideal time to enjoy without rushing and explore more.
alquiler_3h_desc: For those who want the full experience.
alquiler_king_desc: Giant board for groups. Guaranteed fun.
camp_meta_titulo: Summer Camps | DR Paddle Surf Torremolinos
camp_meta_desc: Summer camps in Torremolinos. Paddle surf, kayak, beach games and sports activities. Monday to Friday, 10:00 to 14:00. Book your spot.
camp_intro_titulo: A week full of sports, sea and fun
camp_intro_texto1: Our summer camps are designed so that young people enjoy the sea while learning paddle surf, kayak and sports activities in a safe and fun environment.
camp_intro_texto2: Every week we do different activities so they live an unforgettable experience, always accompanied by qualified instructors.
camp_precio_desc: Includes all equipment, insurance and instructors.
grupos_meta_titulo: Groups & Events | DR Paddle Surf Torremolinos
grupos_meta_desc: Activities for groups, schools, companies, team building and bachelor parties in Torremolinos. Paddle surf, kayak and sea experiences. Book your activity.
grupos_intro_titulo: Activities for groups, schools, companies and parties
grupos_intro_texto1: We organize activities for groups of all sizes: schools, companies, team building, bachelor parties, families and friends. A different, fun experience, perfect to boost teamwork, communication and connection with nature.
grupos_intro_texto2: All activities are carried out with qualified instructors and top-quality equipment, ensuring safety and fun.
grupos_card1_desc: Educational and sports activities for school groups. Paddle surf, kayak and beach games.
grupos_card2_desc: Perfect for companies that want to improve team cohesion in a natural environment.
grupos_card3_desc: A different, fun activity, perfect for large groups.
grupos_card4_desc: Live a unique experience at sea with your loved ones.
grupos_duracion_texto1: Activities usually last around 3 hours. The price may vary depending on group size and type of activity.
grupos_duracion_texto2: For large groups, we recommend booking in advance to ensure availability.
